profile.name: Chen Shen
profile.title: Asset Integrity & Reliability Engineer
profile.summary: Engineering professional with 10+ years supporting gas transmission, facilities, asset integrity, reliability, and technical programs within regulated utility and industrial environments. Demonstrated ability to lead technical staff, contractors, and trainees; manage budgets up to $500k+; and support operational and capital sustainment programs.

highlights: Manage ~$300k/year integrity budget; coordinate up to 10 contractors for ILI, integrity digs, NDE
Own full lifecycle of integrity dig program: planning, execution, post-dig learning, gap closure
Develop integrity KPIs and dashboards for senior management
Technical leadership per CSA Z662 and internal standards
Managed piping reliability program with budget exceeding $500k
Led 5 external contractors for inspection, assessment, repair, material upgrades
Created Power BI KPI dashboard; developed SQL/R scripts saving 100+ hours per engineer
Led materials integrity and corrosion research for plant reliability
Led cooling water treatment and pipeline integrity research programs
Supervised up to 3 lab technicians; managed research funding
Root Cause Failure Analysis using metallurgy tests (microstructure, SEM/EDX)
Eco-friendly chemical additives for corrosion inhibition; won provincial research funding

education: PhD, Chemical Engineering – University of Alberta
BSc & MSc, Mechanical Engineering – Henan University of Science and Technology
